summary: Run a bounded strong-pi pulsed ODMR alignment screen on tracked candidate image145844_r01.
scientific_rationale: The r01 TrackCenter succeeded at final_counts_kcps=38.629 at [114.557435, 118.060876, 116.259791] um. The human requested magnetic-field alignment judged by strong-pi pulsed ODMR and rejection if no clear usable resonance appears. A quantitative planning calculation gives B about 358.6 G for a 3.875 GHz ms=+1 resonance, 13C Larmor about 0.384 MHz, and mod_depth=1 pi time about 50 ns, so length_rabi_pulse=52 ns is near a strong-pi condition. A +/-50 MHz screen around 3.875 GHz with 5 MHz spacing should detect a clear usable resonance for an aligned candidate, but is not intended as a precision center measurement.
comparison_targets: pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1 staging manifest and Rabimodulated.xml inspected this wake
recent image150635 route lesson: avoid hidden second auto-align after a fresh standalone TrackCenter
expected_evidence: terminal savedexperiment and raw readout export for strong-pi pulsed ODMR
raw/readout-aware evidence for or against a clear resonance in 3.825-3.925 GHz
stored-average and drift/advisory provenance before any fit-derived center is used
success_criteria: bridge execute completes with nonzero acquired data
raw readouts show a clear resonance-scale feature consistent with expected strong-pi contrast and above noise/baseline variation
no tracking/count-collapse/hardware anomaly invalidates the data
stop_conditions: bridge queue becomes occupied before submission
verifier or MATLAB advisory blocks execute
RunExperiment aborts or returns zero averages/no saved data
bridge_action: execute managed single-item batch for pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1
